summary: Iteration 60 - Seasonal Pricing & Vehicle Inspections Backend Testing. All 16 tests passed (1 skipped). Both P1 features fully working: (a) Seasonal/Promo Pricing CRUD with agency ownership security, (b) Vehicle Inspection/Etat des lieux CRUD with 10-item default checklist.
critical_code_review_comments: Seasonal pricing endpoints correctly implement agency ownership check (403 for non-owned vehicles)
Public seasonal pricing endpoint correctly filters to only active entries
Vehicle model includes seasonal_pricing field in GET /api/vehicles/{id} response
Inspection defaults endpoint returns 10-item checklist as specified
Inspection CRUD properly validates duplicate type per reservation (400 error)
Inspection creation triggers notification to client
Checkout inspection sets reservation status to 'active'
seed_data_creation: Created test inspections for reservation 008041ee-6806-4056-b7d2-d64b43362608 and cefb2a49-0507-40fd-b31e-c3b3b1b1b9f4
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P1 features fully working. Seasonal pricing: PUT/GET admin endpoints + public endpoint + vehicle detail includes field. Inspections: defaults (10 items), CRUD, duplicate prevention, agency security. Existing reservation 60722ab4 has both checkout and checkin inspections.
